case_title: EDWARD SINS VS. GARY RIGGS et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SINS, EDWARD TRUSTEE OF THE GEORGE SINS TESTAMENTARY TRUSTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIGGS, GARY RIGGS, GLORIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1144 IRVING ST. S. F. CA., AND ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT RIGGS, GARY RIGGS, GLORIA

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SINS, EDWARD TRUSTEE OF THE GEORGE SINS TESTAMENTARY TRUSTS AS TO DEFENDANT RIGGS, GARY RIGGS, GLORIA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SINS, EDWARD TRUSTEE OF THE GEORGE SINS TESTAMENTARY TRUSTS SERVED OCT-08-2002, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SINS, EDWARD TRUSTEE OF THE GEORGE SINS TESTAMENTARY TRUSTS SERVED OCT-08-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RIGGS, GARY
